name: /promote-standard dry-run reports planned promotion without writing the rule file
command: mkdir -p standards/snapshots active-rules && printf 'sections:\n  5.2.4: x\n' > standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/promote-standard.sh" owasp-asvs 5.2.4 --snapshot standards/snapshots/owasp-asvs.yaml --rules-out active-rules --dry-run 2>out.txt && [ ! -f active-rules/owasp-asvs-5-2-4.yaml ] && grep -q 'planned: promote owasp-asvs:5.2.4' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
